query_title: The Spy Who Came In from the Cold

recommendations.title: The Front
recommendations.overview: A cashier poses as a writer for blacklisted talents to submit their work through, but the injustice around him pushes him to take a stand.

recommendations.title: Hombre
recommendations.overview: John Russell, disdained by his "respectable" fellow stagecoach passengers because he was raised by Indians, becomes their only hope for survival when they are set upon by outlaws.

recommendations.title: The Long, Hot Summer
recommendations.overview: Accused barn burner and conman Ben Quick arrives in a small Mississippi town and quickly ingratiates himself with its richest family, the Varners.

recommendations.title: Nuts
recommendations.overview: A high-class call girl accused of murder fights for the right to stand trial rather than be declared mentally incompetent.

recommendations.title: Stanley & Iris
recommendations.overview: An illiterate cook at a company cafeteria tries for the attention of a newly widowed woman. As they get to know one another, she discovers his inability to read. When he is fired, she takes on trying to teach him to read in her kitchen each night.

recommendations.title: Norma Rae

recommendations.title: Hud

recommendations.title: The Book of Life
recommendations.overview: The journey of Manolo, a young man who is torn between fulfilling the expectations of his family and following his heart. Before choosing which path to follow, he embarks on an incredible adventure that spans fantastical worlds where he must face his

recommendations.title: The Courier
recommendations.overview: Cold War spy Greville Wynne and his Russian source try to put an end to the Cuban Missile Crisis.
A young British soldier must find his way back to safety after his unit accidentally abandons him during a riot in the streets of Belfast.
